---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the Skill Creator
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `/skill-creator`
2. Select '...'
3. See error / unexpected behavior

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.x.x]
- Model: [e.g., Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6]
- Target LLM (if not Claude): [e.g., Cursor, Windsurf]

## Additional context

Any other relevant information, screenshots, or logs.
